global_production_variables.directorial_treatment: Warm, gentle children's picture-book adaptation: soft practical lighting, playful dog-level eyelines, cozy domestic color palette, clear readable actions that match the rhyme line-for-line. Keep Buster's black-and-white markings locked; never recolor. Prefer continuous blocking over flashy cuts; dream sequence may soften edges and cool the palette without losing character identity.

Character_Buster.description: Small black-and-white mixed dog (never brown, tan, or solid black redesign), compact playful build, floppy ears, bright curious eyes, slightly goofy 'noodle head' expression; daytime: natural short black-and-white fur; bedtime: matching black-and-white dog pajamas over the same markings. Stable face and coat pattern every scene.
Character_Buster.voice_profile: Young playful dog energy if any vocalizations: soft yips, happy pants, light playful grumbles; not a deep bark. Same vocal character every scene. Spoken lines are rare; mostly physical comedy under narrator.

Character_Mom.description: Warm adult woman, mother figure, medium build, kind face, soft shoulder-length brown hair, cozy evening home clothes (cardigan or soft sweater, comfortable pants), gentle hands; consistent wardrobe colors soft blue/cream across the night. Never a teen redesign.
Character_Mom.voice_profile: Adult female, warm mid pitch, calm patient pace, slight smile in the voice, clear enunciation for a children's book, gentle authority. Same voice every scene.

Character_Daddy.description: Adult man, father figure, medium build, short brown hair, kind tired evening face, soft sleepwear or casual evening shirt; mostly in or near the parents' bed. Stable face and hair; never a different actor redesign.
Character_Daddy.voice_profile: Adult male, low-mid warm pitch, quiet sleepy energy, few or no lines; soft breathing/sleep presence. Same voice every scene if he speaks.

Character_Narrator.description: Off-screen storybook narrator only; never appears on camera as a person.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Warm adult storyteller, friendly mid pitch, playful bounce on rhymes, clear diction for kids, unhurried bedtime pace with a smile. Same voice every scene.

Loc_Living_Room.description: Cozy family living room / entry area of a modest house at evening, soft lamps, dog-friendly clutter free of hazards.
Loc_Living_Room.visual_lock: Warm lamp light, soft sofa or armchair, visible water bowl area nearby, front door to yard, cream/beige walls, wooden floor accents. No modern neon tech clutter. Treat jar or treat plate can appear near Mom's chair.

Loc_Backyard.description: Small evening backyard with bushes and grass where a dog can potty.
Loc_Backyard.visual_lock: Dusk/evening outdoor light, green bushes along a fence line, grass patch, house exterior wall and door visible for in/out continuity. No busy street traffic.

Loc_Stairs_Hall.description: Indoor staircase leading up to the parents' bedroom hallway.
Loc_Stairs_Hall.visual_lock: Carpeted or wood stairs with simple banister, soft night lighting from upstairs hall, family-home photos optional but no readable personal names. Same wall color family as living room.

Loc_Parents_Bedroom.description: Parents' bedroom with a large bed, nightstands, soft bedding — Buster's preferred sleep spot.
Loc_Parents_Bedroom.visual_lock: Large bed with soft white/cream bedding and pillows, two nightstands, warm bedside lamps, calm wall color. Room labeled only as home bedroom; no name plaques. Window optional with night exterior.

Loc_Dreamscape.description: Soft dream space mixing fluffy snow fields and a sunny yard for bunny-chasing.
Loc_Dreamscape.visual_lock: Slightly soft-focus dream look, fluffy white snow drifts, then open yard grass with cartoon-friendly bunnies; Buster remains the same black-and-white dog. No horror or dark nightmare tones.

scenes.dramatic_function: Establish hero identity and comic tone
scenes.summary: Narrator introduces Buster the Noodle Head Dog: small, black and white, jumps like a frog, not very bright — playful living-room antics.
scenes.continuity_notes: First look at Buster; lock black-and-white coat and small size. No pajamas yet.

music_intent.style_description: Light playful children's underscore with soft piano and pizzicato strings

story_beats.intent: Title-card energy: meet Buster in his home
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster bounds into the living room frame, small black-and-white dog, ears flopping, happy face toward camera height.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's Buster The Noodle Head Dog
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: soft room tone, light collar jingle

story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster jumps around the living room like a frog — springy hops over a rug, landing clumsily but happily.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He jumps around like a frog
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: soft thumps of paws on floor

story_beats.visual_event: Closer look: Character_Buster sits, tilts head; clearly small, black-and-white markings stable.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's small, black, and white

story_beats.intent: Comic 'not very bright' beat without cruelty
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster stares blankly at a simple toy or his own tail, then grins goofily — lovable noodle-head moment.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: But not very bright! He's Buster The Noodle Head Dog

source_excerpts.excerpt: He's Buster The Noodle Head Dog / He jumps around like a frog / He's small, black, and white / But not very bright!

scenes.summary: Momma says it is time for bed; Buster wants to rest but must potty first. Mom explains dogs go outside — which makes no sense in Buster's head.
scenes.continuity_notes: Same living room as scene 1; Mom enters or is revealed; Buster still without pajamas.

music_intent.style_description: Soft bedtime cue under playful confusion
music_intent.mood_arc: Cozy call to bed → comic puzzlement

story_beats.visual_event: Character_Mom stands in the living room doorway/area, looking at Character_Buster with a gentle smile, speaking on camera.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Mom
story_beats.dialogue: It's time for bed
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom faces Buster; Buster looks up at her; camera favors Mom then includes dog.

story_beats.intent: Buster wants to rest his head
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster yawns and lowers his furry head toward a cushion, ready to sleep immediately.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: When Momma says, "It's time for bed", He wants to rest his furry head

story_beats.intent: Potty need before bed; floor is naughty
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster pauses mid-curl, does a little potty dance / shifts paws; glances at the floor then guiltily away — he knows going on the floor is naughty.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Before he goes, he has to potty. Going on the floor is naughty!

story_beats.intent: Mom states the outside rule; Buster confounded
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Mom points toward the door and speaks; Character_Buster cocks his head in total confusion, noodle-head blank stare.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Mom
story_beats.dialogue: A doggy goes outside
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom faces Buster and the door; Buster's eyeline to Mom then door.

story_beats.visual_event: Hold on Character_Buster's puzzled face as the idea 'makes no sense' — freeze-frame-ish comic beat then he accepts and turns toward the door.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: "A doggy goes outside" Mom said. That makes no sense in Buster's head!

source_excerpts.excerpt: When Momma says, "It's time for bed", He wants to rest his furry head Before he goes, he has to potty Going on the floor is naughty! "A doggy goes outside" Mom said That makes no sense in Buster's head!

scenes.setting: Evening — backyard bushes, then return inside
scenes.summary: Buster goes outside among the bushes, does his job, comes back in, and does a little spin for Mom.
scenes.continuity_notes: Exterior dusk then re-enter same living room; Mom waiting inside for the spin.

music_intent.style_description: Light outdoor evening motif then cheerful return sting

story_beats.intent: Buster heads outside to walk around
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster trots out the door into the backyard; evening light, bushes visible.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Yet, off he goes to walk around Outside where bushes can be found
must_not: daytime bright noon sun if continuity is evening

story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster sniffs bushes, lifts a leg or squats tastefully behind foliage silhouette — job done, then shakes and turns back toward the house.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He does his job, and then comes in

story_beats.intent: Return inside and spin for Mom
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster re-enters Loc_Living_Room where Character_Mom waits; he does a little proud spin in front of her.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: For Mom he does a little spin
story_beats.blocking_notes: Buster spins facing Mom; Mom smiles down at him.

source_excerpts.excerpt: Yet, off he goes to walk around Outside where bushes can be found He does his job, and then comes in For Mom he does a little spin

scenes.setting: Evening — living room treat and water
scenes.dramatic_function: Reward ritual and healthy habit beat
scenes.summary: Buster spins for a treat; Mom lays it by his feet; he drinks water — narrator notes this is good for you too.
scenes.continuity_notes: Continuous evening living room after return from yard.

music_intent.style_description: Sweet reward motif, soft xylophone and strings

story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster spins again eagerly; Character_Mom holds a small dog treat.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He spins around to get a treat
must_not: human junk food as treat prop if avoidable

story_beats.intent: Mom gently places treat by his feet
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Mom gently lays the treat by Character_Buster's front feet; he sniffs and eats politely.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: She gently lays it by his feet
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom's hand enters frame low; Buster's eyeline to treat then Mom.

story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster laps water from his bowl; Character_Mom watches kindly nearby.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He has his drink of water too. This also would be good for you!

source_excerpts.excerpt: He spins around to get a treat She gently lays it by his feet He has his drink of water too This also would be good for you!

scenes.setting: Night — living room to stairs in pajamas
scenes.summary: Buster wears black-and-white pajamas and climbs the many stairs toward Mom and Daddy's room.
scenes.continuity_notes: Pajamas now on Buster — still black-and-white matching coat. Mom may help or watch from base of stairs.

story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster now wears black-and-white dog pajamas matching his fur; he stands proudly in the living room as Character_Mom adjusts a sleeve or smiles.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Pajamas, black and white he wears
must_not: pajama colors that break black-and-white lock

story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster climbs the staircase step by step in pajamas; camera follows upward through Loc_Stairs_Hall.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: And then he climbs the many stairs

story_beats.visual_event: At the top of the stairs, Character_Buster aims down the hall toward the open parents' bedroom door; warm light spills out.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: To get to Mom and Daddy's room

source_excerpts.excerpt: Pajamas, black and white he wears And then he climbs the many stairs To get to Mom and Daddy's room And jump in bed, and none too soon

scenes.summary: Buster jumps into Mom and Daddy's bed none too soon; home-sweet-home comfort.
scenes.continuity_notes: Parents in or settling into bed; Buster still in black-and-white pajamas.

story_beats.intent: Jump into bed none too soon
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster leaps onto the big bed where Character_Mom and Character_Daddy are settling; soft landing among pillows.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: And jump in bed, and none too soon
story_beats.blocking_notes: Buster jumps from foot of bed toward middle; parents react with fond amusement not anger.
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: soft bed creak, happy dog pant

story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster nestles between or beside Character_Mom and Character_Daddy; cozy wide of the bedroom labeled only by warmth — home sweet home feeling.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Home sweet home.

source_excerpts.excerpt: To get to Mom and Daddy's room And jump in bed, and none too soon

scenes.summary: Though not that smart, Buster knows he will dream of fluffy snows and bunnies across the yard that he chases hard; sleep because tomorrow is another day.
scenes.continuity_notes: Start from sleeping Buster in bed, dissolve to dream; Buster identity locked black-and-white even in dream.

music_intent.style_description: Dreamy celesta and soft pads, playful chase rhythm mid-scene
music_intent.mood_arc: Drift → playful chase → settle toward sleep

story_beats.intent: He's not that smart but he knows dreams are coming
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster's eyes grow heavy on the pillow in Loc_Parents_Bedroom; soft dissolve begins.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's not that smart, but still he knows He'll have a dream of fluffy snows,

story_beats.visual_event: In Loc_Dreamscape, Character_Buster bounds through fluffy white snow drifts, joyful and free.
story_beats.speaker: none

story_beats.intent: Bunnies across the yard; hard chase
story_beats.visual_event: Dream yard: bunnies run across grass; Character_Buster chases them hard, leaping and sprinting, never catching meanly — pure play.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Or bunnies running 'cross the yard And how he'll chase them very hard

story_beats.intent: Sleep because tomorrow is another day
story_beats.visual_event: Dream softens; return dissolve to Character_Buster closing eyes fully in the real bed.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He goes to sleep because they say Tomorrow is another day

source_excerpts.excerpt: He's not that smart, but still he knows He'll have a dream of fluffy snows, Or bunnies running 'cross the yard And how he'll chase them very hard He goes to sleep because they say Tomorrow is another day

scenes.summary: Another day awaits silly dogs; Buster falls asleep warm, soft, well-fed; Mommy pets him; this noodle head is loved for keeps — Zzzzzzzz.
scenes.continuity_notes: Lamps dimmer; Buster fully asleep in pajamas; Mom pets him; Daddy peaceful nearby.

music_intent.style_description: Soft closing lullaby resolving to quiet sustain

story_beats.visual_event: Gentle hold on sleeping Character_Buster; faint smile of dream still on his face.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Another day for silly dogs To run and play and jump like frogs

story_beats.visual_event: Character_Buster lays down his head fully, body relaxed and warm under a corner of the blanket; soft breathing.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He falls asleep, lays down his head He's warm and soft and quite well-fed

story_beats.intent: Mommy pets him while he sleeps
story_beats.visual_event: Character_Mom gently pets Character_Buster's head and back while he sleeps; Character_Daddy rests nearby peacefully.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: His Mommy pets him while he sleeps
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom's hand strokes Buster; eyeline loving down at dog; Daddy optional soft smile eyes closed.

story_beats.visual_event: Wider cozy family bed tableau: Character_Buster asleep between love of Character_Mom and Character_Daddy; lights very soft.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: This noodle head is loved for keeps.....

story_beats.visual_event: Extreme close on Character_Buster's peaceful sleeping face; subtle Zzz graphic optional as soft on-screen text only if tasteful; fade toward black.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Zzzzzzzz
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: soft snoring, music resolve to silence
must_not: loud alarm or jump scare end

source_excerpts.excerpt: Another day for silly dogs To run and play and jump like frogs He falls asleep, lays down his head He's warm and soft and quite well-fed His Mommy pets him while he sleeps This noodle head is loved for keeps.....
